rationale: Educ. Code §11.154 governs school district sale of real property and is unrelated to residence homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict arises.
quote: The board of trustees of an independent school district may, by resolution, authorize the sale of any property, other than minerals, held in trust for public school purposes.
_note: Rule text concerns school district property sales; no operative relationship to homestead exemption valuation.
